hero.subtitle: Post to your channels, let every application enter the pipeline with its fit already scored, and move it through to offer. And when you hire, the candidate becomes an employee without re-entering a single field.

demo.hint: Click a candidate to advance them →
demo.hiredBanner: Hired → already an employee in HRIS, nothing re-entered

distribucion.body: Import jobs from XML, CSV or a URL, or write them with AI. Distribute to each channel based on your budget and goal, and measure cost per application by source.
checks: Import XML · CSV · URL, or write with AI
Multichannel distribution with CPA per source
The channel optimizer suggests where to invest
distribucion.panelFoot: Bar = applications · right = cost per application

pipeline.titleAccent: with their fit and their trail
pipeline.body: Fit is scored against the job profile; the breakdown (skills, experience) is explainable, never a black box. Every stage move is logged with who and when.
pipeline.badge: Explainable fit + traceability of every step

career.bodyPre: Every company gets its own page at
career.bodyPost: . AI writes the whole thing from an intake, with a tone selector; you edit and publish. Every application arrives tagged with its source.

cta.body: When you hire, the candidate becomes an employee with nothing re-entered. Follow the thread into the HRIS.
